candidate_problem_record.subject: Biology
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
An experiment was conducted to observe the light-absorbing properties of chlorophylls and carotenoids using a spectrophotometer.
At approximately what wavelength does chlorophyll a maximally absorb light?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 进行了一项实验,以观察使用分光光度计测量叶绿素和类胡萝卜素的光吸收特性。首先将颜料提取并溶解于溶液中。然后用不同波长的单色光照射溶液,测量溶液在各波长处的吸光度。结果绘制成下图所示的吸收光谱曲线。根据图中叶绿素的吸收峰,叶绿素大约在何波长处吸收光最强?
metadata.explanation_zh: 如果观察叶绿素a的吸收光谱,你会发现两个显著的吸收峰,一个在大约425纳米(可见光谱的蓝色区域),另一个在大约680纳米(可见光谱的红色区域)。叶绿素a在大约680纳米的波长处具有最大光吸收。

normalized_value.title: SciVerse 开放题
normalized_value.rewritten_question_text:
An experiment was conducted to observe the light-absorbing properties of chlorophylls and carotenoids using a spectrophotometer.
At approximately what wavelength does chlorophyll a maximally absorb light?

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The question is fully stated and expects an approximate numeric wavelength read from the spectrum. The graph is readable enough to identify chlorophyll a and its highest absorption peak in the blue region at about 425-430 nm, so the image-text pair is understandable.

conflict_pairs.detail: 题目依赖图像，但题干中视觉锚点表达较弱。
